creator: fluffy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to bergerkos from comment #5)
nope, I meant "export as pdf" -- button and via menu
same for print -- print to file - as pdf

as u can see on screenshot -- text is not garbled, all cyrillic and latin chars on place

I have an idea. Try to set a global MM_CHARSET=UTF-8 for profile. 

my ~/.login_conf:

me:\
        :charset=UTF-8:\
        :lang=en_GB.UTF-8:\
        :tc=default:
